title: Find an organisation that sells Shared Ownership homes in England
body: "Many organisations offer shared ownership homes across England including housing associations, local councils and homebuilders.  You can find out more about finding a Shared Ownership home and where to look.  Find a shared ownership home  Use this service to find an organisation that sells Shared Ownership homes in England (excluding London).  You can find a Shared Ownership home in London on the Homes for Londoners website.  What you’ll need  You can use this service to search for shared ownership homes by local authority area.  You can search up to 3 local authority areas at a time.  You can find a local council by postcode if you’re not sure which local authority areas to search.  What information is included  This service lists organisations offering homes as part of the following schemes:   Shared Ownership Home Ownership for people with Long-term Disabilities (HOLD) Older Persons Shared Ownership (OPSO) Rent to Buy   Find an affordable home  Search   This service shows the latest information provided by housing organisations. It is updated regularly.     Check back often to access the latest opportunities.  "
